description.value:
A heavy mechanized crossbow that fires a grapple bolt trailing a strong cable. Beyond dealing damage, it can entangle, trip, and restrain targets â€” or pull them toward the user.

Training

LevelProperties
UntrainedTwo-Handed, Heavy, Ranged d6 (80/320), Piercing
BasicTwo-Handed, Heavy, Ranged d6+4 (80/320), Reload bonus, Clockwork, Entangle, Keen, Punch, Trip
MasterTwo-Handed, Heavy, Ranged d6+4 (80/320), Reload bonus, Clockwork, Entangle, Keen, Punch, Trip â€” all bonuses apply
Master PerkTargets have disadvantage on ability checks to resist the Entangle pull. You may choose to fire the grapple bolt without dealing damage.
